claims.summary: Verify reciprocity age uses local bridge arrival/send timestamps and surfaces future skew rather than trusting a remote clock.
Verify active connections become bidirectional_stale_telemetry after the 60-second window.
Verify pressure-trend and related telemetry deques remain bounded during high-frequency input.
Verify missing dynamic flux falls back to history-derived flux while retaining high-entropy smoothing and active constraints.
